name: Breton Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Completely line a 13x9-inch (3.5L) baking pan with foil.
2. Arrange a single layer of crackers over the bottom of the pan.
3. Arrange a second layer of crackers to cover spaces between crackers in the first layer. Break some crackers in half if necessary to fully cover the bottom.
4. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar and butter. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
5. Remove from heat; pour evenly over the crackers in the pan.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 5 minutes.
7. Remove from oven; sprinkle with chocolate chips.
8. When the chips are soft, spread them over the top.
9. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
10. Chill until the chocolate is set.
11. Break into pieces to serve. Store in the refrigerator.
